content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changed files: br_health.rs (new, 274 lines), br_process.rs (+1329 lines), service.rs (+1154 lines), success_reconciliation.rs (+708 lines), cli/project.rs (+825 lines), cli/run.rs, tests/cli.rs, .gitignore. All 1036 tests pass (241+1+794), clippy clean with -D warnings, fmt clean. The implementation correctly adds: (1) sync_import command construction and method with dirty-state guard plus beads-export health gate, (2) sync_if_dirty convenience method with on-disk pending-mutation journal recovery and SyncIfDirtyOutcome reporting, (3) ensure_synced public guard, (4) JSONL health check detecting conflict markers, malformed records, missing file, and br unavailability, (5) pre-mutation health gates in service.rs, success_reconciliation.rs, and cli/project.rs, (6) comprehensive unit tests for all new paths. The file-level repo-operation lock correctly serializes mutation/flush/import decisions. The pending mutation journal with per-adapter records enables crash recovery without false-positive dirty flags. The claim_bead_in_br refactor adds a stable claim-owner token for idempotent recovered-flush short-circuits. No bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
